rag_rules: Fix missing semicolons in AGREE guarantee blocks by ensuring each guarantee ends with ';'
Ensure all identifiers in guarantees are visible AADL features or locally declared eq helpers
generic_rules: Use only declared or visible identifiers in AGREE contracts; avoid subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Maintain type consistency: comparisons yield bool, integer literals are int, real literals are real
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Each AGREE guarantee must end with a semicolon
Use 'eq' declarations to create local boolean helpers for complex conditions
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type annex guarantees
Do not use 'integer' or 'boolean' as type names — use 'int' or 'bool'
